title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions!
